arts.ttl: Friedking Group Could Sign 'Rapid' Everton Star Who Wants to Leave for Roma
arts.sum: Roma could target Everton striker Beto this January, with Dan Friedkin's ownership of both clubs greasing the wheels of any potential move.

arts.ttl: Udinese and Roma separated by a point
arts.sum: Roma have won seven of their last nine matches against Udinese in Serie A (D1 L1), including each of the last four; the Friulians` only win against the Giallorossi in that period came back in September 2022 (4-0 at home). Roma are unbeaten in 10 of their last 12 away matches against Udinese in Serie A (W8 D2), after losing three of the previous four (W1).

arts.ttl: “We Must Digest This Defeat and Focus on Tomorrow’s Game”: Runjaic’s Rallying Cry for Udinese
arts.sum: Udinese's head coach Kosta Runjaic addressed the media ahead of the team's important Serie A match against Roma, scheduled to take place at the Bluenergy Stadium. Following a disappointing performance against Como, where Runjaic described the match as possibly "the worst of the year," he expressed his expectations for a strong reaction from his players. arts.ttl: Dybala’s Automatic Contract Renewal Triggered at Roma: Set to Become Serie A’s Third-Highest Paid Player
arts.sum: Paulo Dybala's future at Roma has been secured as the Argentine forward's automatic contract renewal clause has been activated. The extension, which will keep Dybala at the club until June 30, 2026, was triggered during Roma's recent match against AZ Alkmaar, where Dybala reached the required number of appearances and minutes played to activate the clause. arts.ttl: Roma’s Pursuit of Frattesi: Inter’s Starting XI Decision Adds New Twist
arts.sum: The ongoing transfer saga surrounding Davide Frattesi has taken an unexpected turn as Inter Milan prepares to start the midfielder in their upcoming match against Lecce. This development comes amidst intense speculation linking Frattesi with a move to Roma before the January transfer window closes. arts.sum: Former Roma captain and coach Daniele De Rossi has embarked on a new journey in football by rescuing Ostiamare, a Serie D club, from bankruptcy.
